# Shark Branding Solutions
Shark Branding Solutions is a Florida AI visibility and local SEO consultancy. The company helps local businesses improve Google Business Profile performance, local search visibility, structured data, reputation signals, and website conversion.

## Entity
- Business name: Shark Branding Solutions
- Founder and CEO: Michelle Stanaland
- Website: https://www.sharkbrandingsolutions.com
- Phone: (727) 855-6505
- Email: info@sharkbrandingsolutions.com
- Address: 7901 4th St N Suite 300, St. Petersburg, FL 33702
- Service area: Tampa Bay, Tampa, Wesley Chapel, Lutz, Land O' Lakes, St. Petersburg, and surrounding Florida markets
- Community relationship: North Tampa Bay Chamber partner

## Services
- AI visibility consulting
- Generative engine optimization (GEO)
- Local SEO audits
- Google Business Profile optimization
- Structured data and entity optimization
- Reputation and trust signal strategy
- Buyer-intent messaging and landing page conversion
- Executive workshops on AI search and local discovery

## Authority Signals
- Michelle Stanaland was named a Top 15 Marketing Expert in Tampa Bay by Influence Digest in 2024 and 2025.
- Shark Branding Solutions publishes local AI visibility and SEO case studies.
- Shark Branding Solutions focuses on AI visibility, local SEO, reputation, and conversion strategy for local businesses.
